paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.58, with a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 trading sessions. There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

The recent SEC filings include an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026, and a response letter from Everson regarding the company's previous 8-K filing. Other recent filings include an 8-K filing announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and a SCHEDULE 13G filing.

There has been some activity on social media, with 4 new posts in the last 24 hours, including mentions of Fermi Inc. and its announcements, as well as a post about OpenAI's announcement in Georgia. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing, indicating some insider activity, and a total of 25 filings in the feed, including 17 proxy solicitation filings.
